sections.title: If Oziach has not been attempted to be scared by one ghost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Sorry [player name], I'm talking to Oziach right now.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Is this place haunted?

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I don't think so. Would it matter if it was?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Maybe, it depends how haunted. I'm not a big fan of ghosts.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Well, let's hope it's not haunted!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Have you thought about painting the building?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I'm thinking a nice bold red, like the dragon armour.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Or maybe a green, in memory of Elvarg, a very mean dragon.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I think green would look great, it would match the surroundings, too!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Could I get one of those rune platebodies?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Well, normally you'd have to slay a dragon for me...

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: ...but maybe I can make an exception once I've moved in here.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: As a little thank you for the help!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: That would be great! Let's get this deal done quickly.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I can't wait to complete the purchase!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: It's almost done Oziach, not much longer.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Do you have any plans for it?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I have a few. I might convert the top floor into a bar!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: It'll be for all dragon slayers I know, there's a lot of us!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Interesting use of such a beautiful property!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: OoooOooOoOoOoooooooo!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Ah!! Why did you do that?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: That scared me!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I'm sorry! I was just pretending to be a ghost.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Don't do that! I don't like ghosts.

sections.title: When the player attempts to try and scare Oziach for the first time

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I'm going to head back to the office.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Alright, I'll see you later. Can't wait to move in!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I know, it's a lovely place! See you!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Ahhh... soon to be mine.

sections.title: After the player and Iffie have attempted to try and scare Oziach for the second time

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: So many ghosts... I need some help!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Oziach! Are you okay? I heard shouting!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Hello! It's not going well. There are a lot of ghosts here!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: That's not good at all!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Do you still want to go ahead with the purchase?

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: Of course! TWO ghosts is scary, but not that scary!

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: I'll hire myself one of those slayers we see everywhere.

lines.speaker: Oziach
lines.text: They will help with the ghost problem!

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: Phew, that is lovely news! I thought it was all over, then.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I'll head back to the office, meet me there shortly.

lines.speaker: Estate agent
lines.text: I'll be doing the final paperwork.
